subject: DO NOT MERGE! FOR TESTING PURPOSES
commit_message:
DO NOT MERGE! FOR TESTING PURPOSES

I can only do testing in production and as you
can see this change is an example of something
that is not supported and we should not do. I
a just checking if the job throws the right
error message :)

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: Ica7fae0fe1ecade3d99536672264d629b823c29e
